counterexample_or_failure_condition: the approval predates an affected repair or is not independently grounded
expected: an independent reviewer confirms feasibility and finds no blocking gaps
known_bad_detection_method: approval evidence and affected-lane chronology were checked
limitations: Approval remains scoped to the recorded actor and affected review boundary.
observed: Independent fresh-reviewer readiness pass: VERDICT READY-WITH-NOTES, no blockers. Verified the three 1slep findings exist with the claimed attacker_reachability:true/authority_delta:material heads; confirmed attacker_reachability/authority_delta/disposition_rationale are real fields and disposition_rationale is already required non-empty (no new field needed); confirmed seeds 209/213 derive severity from facts so the gate composes without reverting 1skt1; confirmed append-only supersession keeps do_now via required_ac and yields focused (no council) review depth.
proposition: The 1snq2 plan is scoped, feasible, and consistent enough to implement without a readiness blocker.
safety_and_authorization: Local review evidence only; no external side effects.

counterexample_or_failure_condition: A grounded external-actor finding is downgraded or suppressed by the gate, or the change reverts 1skt1 severity, adds a new evidence-record schema field, or expands scope silently.
expected: Grounded external finding derives do_now+blocking; a vacuous material/critical authority_delta claim is rejected; a none-delta reclassification still derives do_now via required_ac; full suite passes.
known_bad_detection_method: the negative-control fixture would fail if the gate suppressed or downgraded a grounded external finding; the reviewer specifically probed whether a real external-attacker finding could lose do_now/blocking
limitations: Prose/docs change plus one authoring-time check; no network service exercised (loopback-only local tooling).
observed: Independent fresh-context delivery review verified derivation untouched, the gate is authoring-time only (not in _validate_synthesis_shape), the 1skt1 severity line is intact, no new schema field, and no silent scope expansion; full suite 5,598 OK; targeted test_review_evidence 68 OK. Verdict approved-with-notes, max severity none, no blockers.
proposition: The credible-threat gate reduces false-positive security escalation without weakening discovery: a grounded external-actor finding still derives do_now and blocking, the change adds no schema field and no silent scope expansion, and it does not revert the 1skt1 fact-based severity work.
public_path: build_compact_review_event derivation (derive_action_required/derive_blocking) plus the full framework test suite
safety_and_authorization: Local disposable test suite only; no external effects.

counterexample_or_failure_condition: A generic seed still carries the old 'assume every boundary exploitable' stance or a project-specific trust class; a missing threat model suppresses a directly evidenced external finding; the removed character-count check remains or still rejects a concise capability basis; or wave/change records still describe the superseded append-only-supersession plan.
expected: Generic seeds are project-neutral and provenance-based with missing-model behavior; no validator check exists; a directly evidenced external finding stays do_now+blocking; a trusted operator-owned finding stays correctness-only; a concise capability basis is accepted; full suite green.
known_bad_detection_method: the two controls would fail if the gate suppressed a grounded external finding or over-escalated a trusted operator-owned defect; a grep-level check confirms no project-specific trust class remains in the generic seed gate sections and the char-count constant is gone
limitations: Prose/docs/seeds change plus removal of one check; no network service exercised (loopback-only local tooling).
observed: This supersedes the premature pre-repair council-delivery approval. All four findings repaired: seed 229 + rendered security-engineer.md reconciled to the symmetric gate; generic seed 213 de-Wavefoundry-ified and provenance-based; seeds 209/213 gained missing-threat-model behavior; the character-count check and _AUTHORITY_DELTA_RATIONALE_MIN_CHARS were removed (capability-naming is reviewer-owned semantic guidance); pre-implementation-review:passed mapped to the prepare council; wave/change records reconciled to the decision-record approach. Two new controls pass (missing-model external stays security-affecting; trusted operator-owned stays correctness-only); concise 'read API keys' basis accepted. Full suite 5,598 OK; targeted test_review_evidence 68 OK; docs-lint clean.
proposition: After the operator delivery review's four do-now repairs, the credible-threat gate is consistent across the generic security carriers, reduces false positives without weakening real findings, adds no validator check and no schema field, and the wave/change records match the decision-record approach.
public_path: seeds 209/213/229 + rendered security-reviewer/security-engineer surfaces; build_compact_review_event derivation; framework test suite
safety_and_authorization: Local disposable test suite only; no external effects.

command_or_fixture: python3 -m unittest tests.test_review_evidence; docs-lint; git diff --check; wave_close(mode='dry_run')
counterexample_or_failure_condition: A blocking finding remains unresolved, or a required signoff or verification is missing at close.
expected: All four prior delivery findings repaired; controls pass; records reconciled; close dry-run blocks only on operator signoff.
known_bad_detection_method: the close dry-run and required-lane gate would still block if any council signoff or verification were missing
limitations: Operator approval covers wave closure only; it does not authorize a git commit.
observed: Operator final re-review PASS: seeds 209/213/229 consistent/project-neutral/provenance-based with safe missing-model handling; character-count validator removed (capability grounding reviewer-owned); both external-actor and trusted-operator controls pass; pre-implementation chronology honestly recorded; change status/wave metadata/decision-record wording reconciled; latest delivery approval fresh, independent, supersedes the premature one. Independent checks: test_review_evidence 68/68 OK, docs-lint clean, git diff --check clean, close dry-run blocks only on operator signoff.
proposition: The operator approves closing 1snq3 after a final delivery re-review returned PASS with no remaining findings.
safety_and_authorization: Operator-authorized closure recorded in the current session.
